recent_changes.description: Fixed 7 debate findings: debate_failed→failed (P0), activeSessions memory leak (P0), adapter validation (P1), turnToken passthrough (P1), REST debate gating (P2), expire state recovery (P2), shutdown wait for debates (P3)
Fixed stale import in e2e-test.js: ClaudeAdapter→ClaudeCodeAdapter, claude-adapter.js→claude-code-adapter.js
Ran debate analysis on extension-hub codebase. 8 findings identified (2 P0, 2 P1, 2 P2, 2 P3)

errors_encountered.solution: File was renamed to claude-code-adapter.js with class ClaudeCodeAdapter. Updated both import path and class name.

decisions_made.decision: Fix all P0+P1 findings immediately, P2+P3 in same session
decisions_made.reason: P0 bugs could cause data corruption (wrong state) and memory leaks. P1 bugs caused silent failures.
Unused profiles exist but don't affect runtime. Low risk, can be cleaned in future refactor.

decisions_made.decision: blockIfDebateActive on REST routes mirrors MCP gating
decisions_made.reason: REST routes were unprotected while MCP tools had getDebateGatingBlock. Same protection needed for both paths.
